items.markdown:
For a beginner massage therapist, the **[Saltability Himalayan Salt Treatment Room Starter Kit](https://www.advantagemedical.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/)** is widely considered the gold standard due to its comprehensive inclusion of professional-grade equipment, eco-friendly waterless warmer, and educational protocols.[[1]](https://www.advantagemedical.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/#:~:text=The%20perfect%20kit%20for%20those,water%20and%20cared%20for%20properly.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)

If you are looking for a more budget-friendly or mobile-focused entry point, other specialized kits offer varying stone counts and warming technologies:[[1]](https://getblys.com.au/blog/hot-stone-massage-kit-home-use/#:~:text=2.%20Number%20and%20Size%20of%20Stones%20Massage,8-12%20basalt%20stones%20is%20a%20great%20choice.)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=himalayan+salt+massage+stones+set+with+warmer+kit#:~:text=10%20PCS%20Himalayan%20Round%20Massage,See%20all%20details)

Professional Starter Kits

[![Saltability Himalayan Salt Treatment Room Starter Kit](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161300-4353-0139-0000-fd639d348375:8)
Saltability Himalayan Salt Treatment Room Starter Kit $685.00 BodyWorkMall 4.8 (5)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:225068830271253449,headlineOfferDocid:13740678770600771093,productDocid:13740678770600771093,rds:PC_4548154486553231692%7CPROD_PC_4548154486553231692&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjC-LSDoqSTAxVFVaQEHb0yDIkQgLcPegQIBRAC) 

- **Components** : Includes an eco-friendly LED-lit stone warmer, **18 hand-carved stones** (6 round, 6 oval, 6 teardrop), a stone coverlet, a 7-day timer, and professional training materials including a manual and video protocol.
- **Therapist Benefits** : The waterless heating system reduces power use by 80% and shields against EMFs, while the stones naturally emit negative ions to enhance the therapeutic environment.
- **Price** : Typically priced around **$685** at retailers like [Massage Warehouse](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/) and [BodyWorkMall](https://www.bodyworkmall.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/).

[![Massage Warehouse - Saltability Therapist's Choice 15 - Innovative Massage Supplies](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161300-4353-0139-0000-fd639d348375:9)
Massage Warehouse - Saltability Therapist's Choice 15 - Innovative Massage Supplies $350.00 MassageWarehouse.com](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:1088985960424181134,headlineOfferDocid:1104514218403222780,productDocid:1104514218403222780&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjC-LSDoqSTAxVFVaQEHb0yDIkQgLcPegQIBRAQ) 

- **Components** : A portable warming bag with a digital temperature controller, car adapter for mobile services, and **15 stones** (5 round, 5 oval, 5 teardrop).
- **Best For** : Mobile therapists or those with limited space, as it heats in 20 minutes and maintains warmth even after being disconnected from power.
- **Price** : Available for approximately **$350** at [Massage Warehouse](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/saltability-therapists-choice-15/).

- **Components** : Features a **bamboo tray** (13"x10.5"x2") with an adjustable thermostat, a washable cover, and an assortment of pink and gray Himalayan salt stones.
- **Therapist Benefits** : Offers a more natural aesthetic for the treatment room while providing precise temperature control for professional use.
- **Price** : Retails for around **$397** at [Spa & Bodywork Market](https://spabodyworkmarket.com/products/bamboo-heating-tray-with-15-himalayan-salt-stones-and-adjustable-thermostat?variant=50782222418202&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic).[[1]](https://saltability-wholesale.myshopify.com/products/portable-massage-stone-warmer)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6557729963456802670&ibp=oshop)[[4]](http://www.multiscaleconsulting.com/dbehhshop/blog/post/saltability-himalayan-salt-stone-massage-provides-waterless-eco-friendly-treatment-for-spas#:~:text=%E2%80%9CAs%20a%20spa%20director%2C%20I,against%20germs%20in%20the%20air.)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13740678770600771093&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1104514218403222780&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:16342686094550942933&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://my.ucolearning.com/p/himalayan-salt-stone-massage-therapy-training-and-certificate#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Stone%20Mobile%20Massage%20Set%2C%2015,even%20after%20disconnecting%20from%20a%20power%20source.)[[9]](https://www.advantagemedical.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/#:~:text=The%20perfect%20kit%20for%20those,water%20and%20cared%20for%20properly.)

Entry-Level & Specialty Kits

[![Himalayan Salt Stone Starter Kit for Massage](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161300-4353-0139-0000-fd639d348375:10)
Himalayan Salt Stone Starter Kit for Massage $28.95 Saltability](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:1547301468916138496,gpcid:4720473019456455075,headlineOfferDocid:226215969605041834,catalogid:12250368600628725903,productDocid:2563704107221555414&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjC-LSDoqSTAxVFVaQEHb0yDIkQgLcPegQICBAC) A minimalist kit from [Saltability](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-stone-starter-kit-for-massage?variant=31744576651362&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic) priced at **$28.95** , featuring 2 round stones, a block file for smoothing, and a "how-to" card. It is intended for those who already have a dry heating method.

Includes a variety of stone shapes (wand, roller, sphere, heart) and bath salts for **$37.46** on Etsy , best suited for therapists looking to integrate salt tools into facial or detailed hand/foot work.

[![Massage Warehouse - Saltability 6 Himalayan Salt Heart Stone Set - Innovative Massage Supplies](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161300-4353-0139-0000-fd639d348375:11)
Massage Warehouse - Saltability 6 Himalayan Salt Heart Stone Set - Innovative Massage Supplies $59.95 MassageWarehouse.com](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:4778260189131177182,headlineOfferDocid:13214346153309847174,productDocid:13214346153309847174&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjC-LSDoqSTAxVFVaQEHb0yDIkQgLcPegQICBAQ) A specialized **6-pack of heart-shaped stones** available on [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/Pure-Himalayan-Salt-Works-Hand-Carved/dp/B08KWMMSXK) , ideal for focused trigger point work or as a retail add-on for clients.[[1]](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-stone-starter-kit-for-massage#:~:text=$28.95%20USD,all%20associated%20shipping%20&%20handling%20charges.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2563704107221555414,catalogid:12250368600628725903,gpcid:4720473019456455075&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9603122939181755113&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.amazon.com/Pure-Himalayan-Salt-Works-Hand-Carved/dp/B08KWMMSXK)

Essential Care & Maintenance Tips

- **Waterless Only** : Never use water to heat salt stones, as moisture will cause them to dissolve and develop a rough texture.
- **Sanitization** : Use a natural, EPA-registered, hospital-grade disinfectant spray like **Benefect Decon 30** . Spray the stones and dry them immediately with a cotton towel between clients.
- **Resurfacing** : Keep fine-grit sandpaper or a block file on hand to gently buff out any rough edges that may develop over time due to humidity or use.[[1]](https://saltability-wholesale.myshopify.com/products/portable-massage-stone-warmer)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1759729385702054717,catalogid:14301120647531296627,gpcid:8002529909757812194,mid:576462836158885691&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6557729963456802670&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.saltability.com/products/massage-stones-12-4-each-round-oval-teardrop)

Are you planning to use these stones primarily for **full-body sessions** in a fixed location, or do you need a **portable setup** for mobile massage?
